title: Lemonade's AI Shift And Pet Focus Reframe Growth And Profit Outlook
text: Lemonade's AI shift and pet focus reframe growth and profit outlook. Pet insurance line became Lemonade's largest segment, lifting cross-sell activity platform-wide. Pet insurance in-force premium spiked to $283 million in Q4 2024, 57% increase. Q1 2026: pet insurance surpassed $500 million in-force premium, becoming largest product. Management attributed acceleration to continued AI-powered automation investment, robust customer acquisition across direct and partner channels, scaling of pet insurance business. High conversion rates and cross-sell to existing customer base with $85 million pet premiums from internal channels, minimizing customer acquisition costs. Tenth consecutive quarter growth acceleration with in-force premium up 32% year-over-year, revenue up 71%. AI automation improving claims processing: 55% of claims automated with instant or near-instant processing. Telematics and real-time data refining risk segmentation, driving improved loss ratios. Loss ratio management: gross loss ratio 62% in Q1 2026 vs 85% baseline, 23-point improvement. Strategic positioning: company now focused on AI-driven operational leverage to drive profitability without proportional marketing spend growth.
